untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) explicit trend line identification and tracking (upper/lower lines not available as indicators), (2) pattern height calculation (highest high minus horizontal trend line value), (3) dynamic target calculation based on pattern geometry. These require pattern detection and geometric computation beyond available price/indicator-based conditions. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but cannot replicate formation-height-based target calculation or opposite-side-of-formation stop placement.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using Donchian channels as proxy for trend line breakouts (close crossing dc_upper for upward breakout, dc_lower for downward). However, the core logic of calculating targets by adding/subtracting formation height from trend line values cannot be expressed with available indicators. Pattern-based rules require explicit support/resistance or trend line tracking. Stop-loss percentage set conservatively at 2.0% as default; optimal placement at 'opposite side of formation' cannot be automated without pattern detection.
